flashcards.meaning: A short text written on tombstone/Words inscribed on the grave/tomb in the memory of the one buried / An inscription on a tombstone in memory of the deceased / Words written on a tombstone in the memory of the person who has died / Words written on the tomb of a person / Words written on a tomb/An inscription on a tomb / Words inscribed on a tomb / Words written on the tomb of a dead person / Inscription on a gravestone / words or lines written on the tomb of a person समाधी लेख [SELECTION POST 2024][SSC SO (Audit), 1997][SSC CGL T-1 2011,2016,2017,2018][SSC CGL T-2 2013,2016][SSC MT(NT), 2014][SSC CPO T-1 2024(RE 2016),2019][SSC CHSL T-1 2021][SSC MTS 2022]
flashcards.kdHack: ये इसके पिता की समाधि है क्योंकि इसके ऊपर इसके पिता का नाम लिखा है मतलब कि समाधि लेख।

flashcards.meaning: Showing or feeling no interest, enthusiasm, or concern उदासीन [SSC CPO T-1 2017]
flashcards.kdHack: अगर स्टूडेंट को एक ही पाठी पढ़ाओगे तो वो उदासीन ही हो जायेगा।

flashcards.meaning: A religious song or poem of praise to God or a god/ A song or music in praise of God स्तुति करना [SSC CPO T-1 2017,2018]
flashcards.kdHack: भगवान की स्तुति करते समय गाते है कि हे मन मेरा मन्दिर शिव मेरी पूजा।

flashcards.meaning: A man who pays too much attention to his clothes and personal appearance वस्त्र की ओर विशेष ध्यान देनेवाला मनुष्य
flashcards.kdHack: जब कोई भी आदमी धंधे पर जाता है तो अपने वस्त्र के ऊपर विशेष ध्यान देता है कि अच्छे है या नहीं।

flashcards.meaning: A Person who leaves his own country and goes to live in another/ One who leaves one's country in order to settle permanently in another/ One who goes to settle in another country प्रवासी [SSC CGL T-1 2019][SSC MTS 2020][SSC CHSL T-1 2021][SSC CPO 2014,2015]
flashcards.kdHack: बाहर जाने वाला मतलब कि प्रवासी।

flashcards.meaning: One who settles in another country./A person who comes to one country from another in order to settle/ person coming to a foreign land to settle there/ a person who comes to a country from his own country for settling/ A foreigner who settles in a country आप्रवासी [SSC SO (Audit), 2001][SSC CHSL T-1 2021,2023][SSC CPO PRE 2023][SSC CPO T- 2, 2011]
flashcards.kdHack: आने वाला मतलब कि आप्रवासी।

flashcards.meaning: Which cannot be read./Incapable of being read / Incapable of being read / Impossible to decipher, make out or read / A hand writing which is difficult or impossible to read/ A handwriting that cannot be read/ One who is unable to read and write/ That which cannot be easily read/ That which is incapable of being read or understood अपठनीय [SSC DEO 2008][FCI 2012][SSC CHSL T-1 2020,2022] [SSC CGL PRE-2013,2023][SSC MTS 2013,2023]
flashcards.kdHack: जब बीमार हो जाते है तो डॉक्टर के पास जाते है और डॉक्टर जो दवाई लिखता है वो हम पढ़ नहीं सकते है मतलब कि अपठनीय।

flashcards.meaning: One who is indifferent to pleasure or pain Calmness and indifference to suffering/ Indifference to pleasure and pain/ Calmness and indifference to suffering मनस्वी [SSC SO (Audit), 2005][SSC CGL T1, 2016][SSC INVESTIGATOR 2010]
flashcards.kdHack: वो पत्थर की किस्म का आदमी है मतलब कि उसके ऊपर सुख और दुःख का कोई फर्क नहीं पड़ता है।

flashcards.meaning: Indifferent to pain and pleasure./A person who is indifferent to pain and pleasures of life./Not to be affected by the pleasures and pains of life./One who is indifferent to pleasure or pain/ A person who can endure pain or hardship without showing his feelings or complaining/ a person who is indifferent to pain and pleasures of life/ One who accepts pleasure and pain equally/ One who is unaffected or indifferent to joy, pain, pleasure or grief [SSC SO (Audit), 2003][SSC SO(CA), 2005][SSC CGL T-1 2013,2016,2021,2022][SSC CHSL T-1 2018,2022] [SSC CPO T-1 2019,2023]
flashcards.kdKey: Stoicism, Stoic से ही बना है।
flashcards.kdHack: Stoicism, Stoic से ही बना है।

flashcards.meaning: A person who is able to use both hands with equal skill/ One who is able to use both hands/ Able to use the left hand and right hand equally well/ Using right and left hand equally well/ One who can use both hands efficiently/ one who can use either hand with ease दोनों हाथों से दक्ष [SSC LDC 2010][SSC CGL T-1 2016][SSC CHSL T-1 2019][SSC MTS 2021]
flashcards.kdKey: Ambi = अम्बे माता, dex = दक्ष, us = हमे
flashcards.kdHack: हमे पता है कि अम्बे माता जादू बरसाने में दोनों हाथों से दक्ष है।

flashcards.meaning: A book or paper written in hand/ A paper written by hand/ A paper/story/poem first written out by hand हस्तलिखित [SSC LDC, 2011][SSC CGL T1, 2016]
flashcards.kdHack: आदमी के द्वारा लिखा हुआ लेख हस्तलिखित ही होगा।

flashcards.meaning: An addition to the end of a letter ps./ Anything written in a letter after it is signed पश्च लेख [SSC CPO 2016]
flashcards.kdHack: बाद में लिखना मतलब की पश्च लेख।

flashcards.meaning: Violation or misuse of what is regarded as sacred/ An act of treating a holy thing or place without respect/ Violation of something holy or sacred/ violating the sanctity of religious places/ objects/ Violation of the sanctity of the Church/ Violation of that which is holy and sacred/ Violation of the sanctity of a sacred place धार्मिक चीजो का अपमान करना / पवित्र चीज का अपमान करना [SSC SO (CA), 2006][SSC Statistical Invigilator, 2005][SSC MTS 2021][SSC CHSL T-1 2016,2022][SSC CGL T-2 2016][SSC PH XI 2023]
flashcards.kdHack: धार्मिक चीजो पर शक करना मतलब कि उनका अपमान ही करना है।

flashcards.meaning: One who is excessively worried about one's health/ who is over anxious about his health/ A person who has an unnatural anxiety about one's own health typically involves imagined symptoms of illness/ A person who constantly thinks that he is sick./ A person who thinks he is ill all the time/ A patient with imaginary symptoms and diseases रोगभ्रमी [SSC Statistical Invigilator, 2006][SSC MTS 2021][SSC CHSL T-1 2020][SSC CPO T-1 2018,(RE 2016)]
flashcards.kdKey: Hy = है, pocho = पूछो, n = नहीं, dr = डर
flashcards.kdHack: अगर आप अपने पापा से भाई के लिए ये बोलो कि इसके दो-तीन दिन से छींक आ रही है तो पापा बोलते है कि हे नहीं पूछो उससे वो डर जायेगा क्योंकि वो अपनी health को लेकर बहुत ज्यादा चिंतित रहता है मतलब कि रोगभ्रमी।

flashcards.meaning: A persistent anxiety about one's health usually involving imagined symptoms of illness/ Excessive preoccupation with one's health रोगभ्रम
flashcards.kdHack: Hypochondriac से ही बना है।

flashcards.meaning: One who is always doubting / One who is given to questioning the truth of facts and the soundness of inference/ A person inclined to question or doubt accepted opinions शक्की मिजाज / संदेहवादी [SSC CPO 2014][SSC CGL T-1 2017]
flashcards.kdHack: शक्की किस्म की पत्नी को हमेशा पति पर Doubt ही होता है।

flashcards.meaning: A person pretending to be somebody he is not/ A person who dishonestly pretends to be somebody else/ A person who pretends to be what he is not ढोंगी [FCI, 2012][SSC STENO 2010]
flashcards.kdHack: नेता लोग जो पोस्टर चिपकाते है उनको देखकर लगता है गरीबो की सहायता करने वाला है जबकि ऐसा कुछ भी नहीं होता है मतलब कि ढोंगी।

flashcards.meaning: Bringing about a gentle and easy death especially to end suffering/ Putting to death painlessly to end suffering/ Painless death given to patients to relieve suffering/ Thing that bring gentle and painless death from incurable disease/ Act of mercy killing इच्छा मृत्यु [SSC CGL T-1 2016][SSC CPO 2017]
flashcards.kdKey: Euth = youth (युवा), an = एक, asia = एशिया
flashcards.kdHack: एशिया महाद्वीप का एक युवा बेरोजगारी के कारण इच्छा मृत्यु पसंद करता है।

flashcards.meaning: A large impressive house/ A very large impressive residence [SSC CHSL T-1 2018][SSC CGL T-2 2019]
flashcards.kdHack: सबको पता है, राजा मानसिंह बहुत बडे शानदार घर मे रहते थे।

flashcards.meaning: A person especially a young one with exceptional abilities/ Child of unusual or remarkable talent विलक्षण प्रतिभा संपन्न व्यक्ति [SSC CGL T-2 2016]
flashcards.kdHack: टीवी पर दिखाया जाता है कि रोडीज में विलक्षण प्रतिभा संपन्न व्यक्ति को ही वो लेते है।

flashcards.meaning: Large scale departure of people / A situation in which many people leave a place at the same time निर्गमन, प्रस्थान, विदाई [SSC CHSL T-1 2019]
flashcards.kdHack: विदाई/प्रस्थान के टाइम उन्होंने मुझे जुआरी के रूप में एक सौ दस रूपये दिए।

flashcards.meaning: One who holds a post without any salary/ A post without remuneration/ Conferred as an honour/ A job carrying no salary/ Holding an office without receiving a pay अवैतनिक [SSC CGL T-1 2015,2016][SSC CPO T-1 2019]
flashcards.kdHack: उसे वेतन से कोई मतलब नहीं है वो तो केवल अपने सम्मान के लिए काम करता है मतलब कि अवैतनिक।

flashcards.meaning: A quantity that is more than enough. प्रचुरता [SSC CPO 2015,2016]
flashcards.kdKey: A = एक, bund = बूंद, ance = अनेक
flashcards.kdHack: एक-एक बूंद से अनेक मात्रा में पानी इकट्ठा किया जा सकता है मतलब कि प्रचुरता।

flashcards.meaning: A person who opposes another शत्रु, दुश्मन
flashcards.kdHack: Wanted मूवी में सलमान खान की गनी भाई से एन्टी ही तो रहती है जो कि सलमान खान का दुश्मन था।

flashcards.meaning: The branch of philosophy concerned with the study of principles of beauty, especially in art / Having to do with artistic beauty / Concerned with beauty or the appreciation of beauty/ the philosophy of fine arts/ The branch of philosophy concerned with the study of the principles of beauty, especially in art सौन्दर्यशास्त्र / सौन्दर्यपरक [SSC CHSL 2015,2018][SSC MTS 2022]
flashcards.kdKey: Aes = ऐसी, the = थी, tic = टिकी
flashcards.kdHack: वो ऐसी ही थी कि हर किसी की नजर उस पर टिकी मतलब कि बहुत ही सुन्दर थी।

flashcards.meaning: Something that is absolutely necessary, that you cannot do without./That cannot be done without/ A person who is absolutely necessary for someone or something / that cannot be dispensed with, removed अनिवार्य / आवश्यक [SSC CGL T-1 2023][SSC CGL T-2 2019][SSC MTS 2022]
flashcards.kdHack: डिस्पेन्सरी में दवाईयों का होना आवश्यक है।

flashcards.meaning: An imaginary name assumed by an author for disguise / To write under a different name/ A fictitious name used by an author/ A fictitious name especially one assumed by an author लेखक के द्वारा अपनाया गया दुसरा (भिन्ननाम) [SSC CHSL 2012,2014][SSC CGL T-1 2018][CPO T-2 2019][SSC MTS 2021]
flashcards.kdHack: लेखक के द्वारा अपनाया गया Different name (भिन्न नाम)।

flashcards.meaning: One who goes penalty of death for his persistence in faith/ one who dies for a noble/ Someone who is killed fighting for the cause of religion or faith./ One who suffers for one's faith/ One who embraces voluntary death for the sake of one's country. शहीद [SSC CGL CGL T1 RE, 2015][SSC MTS 2013]
flashcards.kdHack: वो हमेशा देश के लिए मरने के लिए तैयार रहता था इसलिए वो आतंकवादी को मारते-2 उस दिन शहीद हो गया।

flashcards.meaning: One who has strange habits/ A man with abnormal habits सनकी [SSC CGL T-1 2014,2016,2017]
flashcards.kdHack: वो बहुत ही सनकी आदमी है हमेशा सेन्टर में बैठने की ही जिद करता है।

flashcards.meaning: A statement which is accepted as true without proof/ a statement accepted as true without proof सूक्ति /स्वयं सिद्ध
flashcards.kdHack: जो प्रार्थना के बाद ओम भूर्भुवः स्वः । तत्सवितुर्वरेण्यं भर्गो देवस्यः धीमहि । धियो यो नः प्रचोदयात् ।। ये सूक्ति जो हम बोलते है ये अपने आप में स्वयंसिद्ध है।

flashcards.meaning: Someone who loves good food and knows a lot about it./The art of good eating/ a connoisseur of food जो अच्छा खाने में रूचि रखता है / चटोरापन [SSC CHSL T-1 2021]
flashcards.kdHack: वो हमेशा गरम-गरम खाना ही खाता है क्योंकि वो अच्छा खाना खाने में ही रूचि रखता है।

flashcards.meaning: A sudden rush of wind/ A strong blast of wind. झोंका [SSC CGL T-1 2017]
flashcards.kdHack: जैसे ही हवा का तेज झोंका आया तो वो घर के अन्दर घुस गया।

flashcards.meaning: Songs used to help a child fall asleep / A pleasant song used for causing children to sleep/ A gentle song sung to put a child to sleep लोरी [SSC MTS 2020][SSC CGL PRE-2022]
flashcards.kdKey: Lul = ल, ल, la = ला, by = भाई
flashcards.kdHack: जब मां अपने बच्चे को लोरी सुनाती है तो यह कहती है कि ल,ल,ल मेरा प्यारा बच्चा सोजा, लाल पलंग पर सोजा।

flashcards.meaning: A roundabout way of speaking / Indirect or roundabout expression/ A round-about way of expression/ Method of talking in a roundabout way / The use of many words where only a few are necessary घुमा-फिराकर बताना [SSC CPO T-1 2018][SSC SAS, 2010][SSC CGL T-1 2016,2017]
flashcards.kdKey: Cir = सर, Cum = कम, locution = लोकेशन
flashcards.kdHack: बहुत ही कम सर ऐसे है जो अपने घर की location बताते है ज्यादातर तो पूछने पर घुमा फिरा कर बाते करने लगते है।

flashcards.meaning: Mode of behaviour peculiar to a person/ A mode of behaviour or way of thought peculiar to an individual/ A person's peculiar habit व्यवहार का विशेष प्रकार या सिद्धान्त [SSC CHSL T-1 2016][SSC CPO T-1 2018]
flashcards.kdKey: Idio = इडियट, sync = सनकी, crasy = क्रेजी
flashcards.kdHack: अगर कोई आदमी इडियट, सनकी और क्रेजी है तो उसका व्यवहार करने का तरीका विशेष प्रकार का ही होगा।

flashcards.meaning: Steal or misappropriate money/ Steal or misappropriate money placed in one's trust/ Using money placed in one's care in a wrong way to benefit गबन करना /खा जाना [SSC CHSL T-1 2019]
flashcards.kdKey: E = इसके, m = में, bezzle = भेजले
flashcards.kdHack: अरे ये हमेशा पैसो का गबन करता है मेरी मान इसके साथ कोई अपना आदमी भेज ले।

flashcards.meaning: An act of misappropriation of money/ Misappropriation of money गबन [SSC CGL T1, 2016][SSC CHSL 2015]
flashcards.kdKey: E = इसके, m = में, bezzle = भेजले
flashcards.kdHack: अरे ये हमेशा पैसो का गबन करता है मेरी मान इसके साथ कोई अपना आदमी भेज ले।

flashcards.meaning: A partner in crime/ A person who helps another to commit a crime/ An associate in crime गुनाह के साथी [SSC CGL T-1 2014,2017][SSC CHSL 2015][SSC CPO 2014][SSC CGL T-2 2019]
flashcards.kdKey: Ac = एक com = कम, plice = पुलिस
flashcards.kdHack: पुलिस का एक ही काम होता है कि गुनाह या अपराधी के साथी कौन-कौन हैं उनको ढूंढना।

flashcards.meaning: Made or done without previous preparation [SSC CPO 2014]
flashcards.kdHack: मै तो परमपिता परमेश्वर हूं इसलिए मैं तो पहले से बिना तैयारी के आता हूं!

flashcards.meaning: Spoken or done without any previous thought or preparation./A speech made without preparation / Speech delivered without preparation /Spoken or done without preparation / A speech delivered without any preparation/ A speech or a presentation made without previous preparation बिना तैयारी के [SELECTION POST 2024][SSC CHSL PRE 2012,2014,2022,2023][SSC CGL PRE-2016,2017,2022][SSC CPO PRE 2014,2023]
flashcards.kdHack: अगर आप temporary कोई काम करते है बिना तैयारी के करते है।

flashcards.meaning: A small shop that sells fashionable clothes, cosmetics etc बुटिक [SSC MTS-2023][SSC CGL T-1 2016]
Instrument to measure atmospheric pressure/ An instrument for measuring the atmospheric pressure वायु दाब मापक [SSC CPO 2010][SSC CHSL T-1 2018][SSC CGL T-1 2018]
A place where food is kept/ A small room in a big house, hotel, ship etc. where glasses, dishes, spoons, food etc. are kept / A place for provisions etc in the house. भोजन रखने की जगह
A person who breaks into a house in order to steal/ One who breaks into a house to commit theft सेंध लगाने वाला [SO (Audit), 2004]

A place for housing aeroplanes/ a place for housing aeroplanes/ A building in which aircraft are housed/Enclosed area where aircraft are kept and repaired / A large building with an extensive floor area, typically for housing aircraft हैंगर [SSC CGL T-1 2019,2020][SSC MTS 2022]
Present everywhere at the same time.
flashcards.kdHack: Omni (All) + Present -> Someone who is present all over the place.
